title: red flags in the caurasel is static
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report

red flags in the caurasel is static. I want it to be specific given the recent data for p0 log items. If not there don’t show. It should also not reduce the load time for the app so ensure to implement it safely.

---

**Category:** `bug` `enhancement`
**Source:** Telegram Bot
**Status:** Pending implementation

> _This issue was created automatically via the BabyBloom Telegram Bot. No private baby data is included._
enhanced_description:
The user reports that the red flags carousel on the dashboard is currently static (hardcoded content). They want it to be dynamic — showing red flag alerts only when relevant based on recent P0-priority log items (e.g., feeding, sleep, diaper data).
- Affected component: Dashboard carousel / red flags section
- Current behaviour: Red flags are always shown with static/hardcoded content regardless of actual baby data
- Expected behaviour: Red flags should be derived from recent P0 log data; if no concerning data exists, the red flags carousel should not appear at all
- Edge cases: No log data yet (new user), partial data, ensure lazy/deferred loading so it does not increase initial app load time
- Acceptance criteria: Red flags are dynamic based on recent logs, hidden when not applicable, and do not degrade app performance
implementation_notes:
Changes made:
- Files changed: src/tabs/HomeTab.tsx (moved dynamic red flags block outside milestone guard)
- The red flag carousel slide was nested inside an `if (ms)` block, meaning it only showed when milestone data existed. Moved it to be a sibling block so data-driven red flags show independently of milestone availability.
- The useDynamicRedFlags hook (already existed in src/features/insights/useDynamicRedFlags.ts) computes P0 red flags from actual log data: feeding gaps, low wet diaper counts, dirty diaper gaps, week-over-week feeding volume drops, and tummy time gaps.
- Red flags only render when there are actual concerns (dynamicRedFlags.length > 0) — carousel slide is hidden otherwise.
- All computations are memoized (useMemo) so there is no impact on load time.
- Removed duplicate useDataRedFlags.ts file that was accidentally created.
